competitionRules.notes: 世界杯阵容页规则配置；如 FIFA 官方竞赛规程更新，可按赛季覆盖。

qualifiers.espnText: Lineups are announced and players are warming up.

events.description: 首发阵容公布，球员热身。

qualifiers.espnText: First Half begins.
Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Spain. Marc Cucurella is caught offside.
Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Attempt blocked. Rodri (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Fabián Ruiz with a cross.

events.description: 罗德里射门被封堵。 法比安·鲁伊斯参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).
Attempt blocked. Álex Baena (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Pau Cubarsí with a through ball.

events.description: 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳射门被封堵。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Jérémy Doku.

events.description: 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷射门被封堵。 杰里米·多库参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Pedro Porro (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is close, but misses to the left. Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 奥亚萨瓦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Foul by Álex Baena (Spain).
Attempt saved. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Thibaut Courtois (Belgium). Assisted by Pedro Porro.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射正。 佩德罗·波罗参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Spain 1, Belgium 0. Fabián Ruiz (Spain) right footed shot from the centre of the box to the high centre of the goal.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯破门。 比分 1-0。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Timothy Castagne (Belgium).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Thibaut Courtois (Belgium).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Jérémy Doku.
Delay in match (Spain).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Handball by Álex Baena (Spain).
Offside, Belgium. Charles De Ketelaere is caught offside.
Attempt missed. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 亚马尔射门偏出。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Spain 1, Belgium 1. Charles De Ketelaere (Belgium) header from the centre of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Timothy Castagne with a cross.

events.description: 查尔斯·德·克特拉雷破门。 比分 1-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Foul by Pau Cubarsí (Spain).
Pau Cubarsí (Spain) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

events.description: 保罗·库巴尔西吃到黄牌。

qualifiers.espnText: Lamine Yamal (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Pedro Porro (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Álex Baena.

events.description: 佩德罗·波罗射门偏出。 阿莱克斯·巴埃纳参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Brandon Mechele.
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Kevin De Bruyne.
Attempt blocked. Fabián Ruiz (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Rodri.

events.description: 法比安·鲁伊斯射门被封堵。 罗德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Delay in match because of an injury Dani Olmo (Spain).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时5分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain).
First Half ends, Spain 1, Belgium 1.
Second Half begins Spain 1, Belgium 1.
Foul by Marc Cucurella (Spain).
Dani Olmo (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Offside, Spain. Lamine Yamal is caught offside.
Fabián Ruiz (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.
Corner, Belgium. Conceded by Aymeric Laporte.
Álex Baena (Spain) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Marc Cucurella.

events.description: 亚马尔射门被封堵。 马克·库库雷拉参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Corner, Spain. Conceded by Brandon Mechele.
Attempt missed. Dani Olmo (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Pau Cubarsí following a corner.

events.description: 丹尼·奥尔莫射门偏出。 保罗·库巴尔西参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt missed. Maxim De Cuyper (Belgium) left footed shot from the left side of the box is close, but misses to the left.
qualifiers.espnShortText: Maxim De Cuyper Shot Off Target

events.description: 马克西姆·德·屈佩射门偏出。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Ferran Torres replaces Álex Baena.

events.description: 费兰·托雷斯替补登场，换下阿莱克斯·巴埃纳。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Pedri replaces Fabián Ruiz.

events.description: 佩德里替补登场，换下法比安·鲁伊斯。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Lamine Yamal (Spain).
Substitution, Belgium. Romelu Lukaku replaces Hans Vanaken.

events.description: 卢卡库替补登场，换下汉斯·范纳肯。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Axel Witsel replaces Leandro Trossard.

events.description: 阿克塞尔·维特塞尔替补登场，换下特罗萨德。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Joaquin Seys replaces Maxim De Cuyper.

events.description: 华金·塞斯替补登场，换下马克西姆·德·屈佩。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Thibaut Courtois (Belgium). Assisted by Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 亚马尔射正。 奥亚萨瓦尔参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) right footed shot from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Unai Simón (Spain).
qualifiers.espnShortText: Kevin De Bruyne Shot On Target

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Mikel Oyarzabal (Spain) right footed shot from the right side of the six yard box is saved in the bottom right corner by Thibaut Courtois (Belgium).
Corner, Spain. Conceded by Nathan Ngoy.
Dani Olmo (Spain) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).

Delay over. They are ready to continue.

Offside, Spain. Marc Cucurella is caught offside.
Substitution, Belgium. Senne Lammens replaces Thibaut Courtois because of an injury.

events.description: 塞内·拉门斯替补登场，换下蒂博·库尔图瓦。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt blocked. Lamine Yamal (Spain) left footed shot from the right side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Dani Olmo.

events.description: 亚马尔射门被封堵。 丹尼·奥尔莫参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Pedri (Spain) wins a free kick on the left wing.

events.description: 阿克塞尔·维特塞尔犯规。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).
Foul by Pedro Porro (Spain).
Substitution, Spain. Nico Williams replaces Mikel Oyarzabal.

events.description: 尼科·威廉斯替补登场，换下奥亚萨瓦尔。

qualifiers.espnText: Pau Cubarsí (Spain) wins a free kick on the right wing.
Attempt blocked. Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) left footed shot from more than 35 yards is blocked.
Ferran Torres (Spain) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Kevin De Bruyne (Belgium) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

player.name: 亚历克西斯·萨勒马克尔斯

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Belgium. Alexis Saelemaekers replaces Kevin De Bruyne.

events.description: 亚历克西斯·萨勒马克尔斯替补登场，换下德布劳内。

qualifiers.espnText: Substitution, Spain. Mikel Merino replaces Dani Olmo.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺替补登场，换下丹尼·奥尔莫。

qualifiers.espnText: Attempt saved. Pau Cubarsí (Spain) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Senne Lammens (Belgium). Assisted by Pedri.

events.description: 保罗·库巴尔西射正。 佩德里参与进攻。

qualifiers.espnText: Goal! Spain 2, Belgium 1. Mikel Merino (Spain) left footed shot from very close range to the top left corner.

events.description: 米克尔·梅里诺破门。 比分 2-1。

qualifiers.espnText: Fourth official has announced 7 minutes of added time.

events.description: 第四官员示意补时1分钟。

qualifiers.espnText: Foul by Mikel Merino (Spain).
